author: O22C
content: Result: Created .github/workflows/ci.yml with three jobs (test, clippy, fmt) on ubuntu-latest, pinned to Rust 1.87 via dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable, with Swatinem/rust-cache@v2 on test and clippy jobs. README badge added. Local verification: cargo test --workspace passes, cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic -D warnings passes, cargo fmt --check passes.
